childhood.familyBackground: Brazilian industrial and food family. Built beverage and food empire.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 브라질 산업 및 식품 가족. 음료 및 식품 제국 구축
childhood.education: University of São Paulo, business and food science
childhood.educationKo: 상파울루 대학교, 사업 및 식품 과학
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in São Paulo during Brazilian economic boom. Exposed to food and beverages.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 브라질 경제 호황 중 상파울루에서 성장. 식품 및 음료에 노출

careerTimeline.event: Joined family beverage and food business
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족 음료 및 식품 사업에 참여

careerTimeline.event: Expanded production and distribution across Brazil
careerTimeline.eventKo: 브라질 전역의 생산 및 유통 확장

careerTimeline.event: Diversified into juice, beverages, and specialty foods
careerTimeline.eventKo: 주스, 음료 및 특수 식품으로 다각화

careerTimeline.event: Became major Brazilian food and beverage company
careerTimeline.eventKo: 주요 브라질 식품 및 음료 회사가 됨

failures.description: Changing consumer preferences affected product lines
failures.descriptionKo: 변화하는 소비자 선호도가 제품 라인에 영향
failures.lesson: Food industry requires consumer trend adaptation
failures.lessonKo: 식품 산업은 소비자 추세 적응이 필요

personalTraits.knownFor: Building Brazil's major food and beverage company
personalTraits.knownForKo: 브라질의 주요 식품 및 음료 회사 구축
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports agricultural development and rural communities
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 농업 개발 및 농촌 지역사회를 지원
